name: /plugin-install rejects an unsigned plugin when userConfig require_signed_plugins is true
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/unsigned && printf 'name: unsigned
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/unsigned/plugin.yaml && printf 'require_signed_plugins: true
' > userConfig.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/unsigned --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --user-config userConfig.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unsigned_plugin_rejected' err.txt && grep -q 'require_signed_plugins=true' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
